summary: Iteration 9 verified end-to-end. Backend: all 21 pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_9.py PASS (Documents 5/5, Data Import 3/3, Email Templates 4/4, Email Delivery 4/4, Onboarding Tour 5/5) and the iteration 8 regression suite (18/18) still passes. Quick API spot-check (as IT Admin): /api/email-delivery 200, /api/email-delivery/audit 200, /api/onboarding-tour/me 200, /api/email-templates 200. Frontend (HR Admin jessica@solvit.co.ke): sidebar exposes [data-testid=nav-data-import]; /employees row click → /employees/{id} profile shows a 'Documents' tab — clicking [data-testid=profile-tab-documents] reveals [data-testid=documents-tab] with [data-testid=upload-doc-btn], 'PDF, JPEG, PNG, DOCX up to 10MB · Categories editable in Masters Settings' helper text and the empty 'No documents uploaded yet.' table. /data-import (data-testid=data-import-page) renders tabs di-tab-upload/di-tab-templates/di-tab-history and Templates tab shows all three cards tpl-fte_employee / tpl-solver / tpl-historical_performance; Import History tab loads empty state. Frontend (IT Admin itadmin@solvit.co.ke): on login the welcome modal [data-testid=tour-welcome] appears with [data-testid=tour-start-btn] + [data-testid=tour-skip-btn]; clicking Start Tour renders [data-testid=tour-step] tooltips that step through and clear the flag. Masters Settings → 'Email Templates' tab (data-testid=tab-email_templates) renders [data-testid=email-templates-section] with 63 templates across the 15 required modules; selecting tpl-budget.tier_confirm_request opens the editor exposing tpl-subject, tpl-body-editor, tpl-save-btn, tpl-reset-btn, tpl-preview-btn — clicking Preview renders [data-testid=tpl-preview]. 'Onboarding Tour' tab (data-testid=tab-onboarding_tour) renders tour-config-section, tour-headline, tour-body, tour-enabled, tour-save-btn, tour-reset-user, tour-reset-btn and a 'Completion Report' table with role rows (hr_admin/line_manager/finance/employee/solver/executive/it_admin/board). AI & Email Setup page exposes settings-tab-{ai,email,email_delivery,automation,tour,audit}; Email Delivery tab renders email-delivery-section, active-mode-banner (text 'Testing mode is active — All emails are being sent to Mailtrap…'), mode-testing/mode-production toggles, testing/production-smtp_host/smtp_port fields, and test-send-btn. Replay Tour tab renders replay-tour-btn — clicking redirects to /dashboard and re-triggers the welcome modal correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: On mount, the default 'AI Agent' tab issues axios calls that return HTTP 403 for IT Admin. These errors are uncaught and surface as a full-screen 'Uncaught runtime errors' overlay in dev mode (Failed to load resource: 403 + AxiosError logs). The overlay can obstruct interaction with sibling tabs (Email Delivery / Replay Tour) until manually dismissed.

integration_issues.issue: AI Agent tab silently 403s on the AI config endpoint (no graceful 'You don't have access' fallback). Wrap the AI config fetch in try/catch and render an empty/forbidden state instead of letting the error escape to React.

issues: Same React warning still present: 'Updating borderLeft / borderLeftStyle' shorthand+non-shorthand conflict — flagged in iter 8 but still appears in FirstLoginTour.js. Replace borderLeft shorthand with borderLeftWidth/Style/Color.

Console warning: 'Cannot update a component (BrowserRouter) while rendering a different component (FirstLoginTour)' — setState during render in FirstLoginTour.js; wrap the navigate/setState call in useEffect.

action_items: (HIGH) Settings.js / AI panel: catch 403 from /api/ai/* on IT Admin (or any role without AI access) so it doesn't bubble to React's runtime-error overlay. Currently the overlay blocks subsequent tab interaction until dismissed.

(Minor) FirstLoginTour.js: fix 'setState in render' warning by moving the side-effect into useEffect and replace borderLeft shorthand with borderLeftWidth/Style/Color to silence repeating React style warnings.

(Note) Spec said the Documents tab testid should be `documents-tab`; the implementation exposes BOTH `profile-tab-documents` (the tab button) and `documents-tab` (the container) — both selectors work, just noting for QA stability.
critical_code_review_comments: Settings.js — the AI Agent panel makes API calls without role-gating or try/catch; an IT Admin landing on /settings sees a dev-mode runtime-error overlay before they can navigate to Email Delivery / Replay Tour. In production the overlay is suppressed, but the network 403 cascade still happens — wrap network calls in try/catch and render a permission-aware empty state.
EmailDelivery.js / FirstLoginTour.js — borderLeft shorthand+longhand conflict has been outstanding since iteration 8. Cheap fix worth doing.

DataImport templates download — Templates tab renders 3 cards as required; backend GET /api/data-import/template/{type} returns valid xlsx with PK header (covered by test_template_download_all_three). No issues observed.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on review-request UI checks reached (Documents tab + upload-doc-btn; Data Import nav + page + 3 template cards + history tab; Email Templates section with 63 templates incl. subject/body/save/reset/preview testids and preview render; Onboarding Tour config section with completion report; Email Delivery banner + mode toggles + smtp fields + test-send-btn; First-Login welcome modal + start/skip + tour-step; Replay Tour button re-triggers the modal). One HIGH-priority caveat: AI Agent tab's 403 noise can occlude tabs in dev mode.

test_credentials: Per /app/memory/test_credentials.md — used jessica@solvit.co.ke (HR Admin) and itadmin@solvit.co.ke (IT Admin), password Solvit@2026.
seed_data_creation: test_iteration_9.py creates and self-cleans: one document row (TEST upload→delete cycle), one data_import_log validate run (no import committed), one template edit + reset, one email-delivery mode update + switch (audit row left as expected), one tour complete + replay reset.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-9 review items verified. Remaining nit: Settings.js AI tab → 403 axios overlay (cosmetic in prod, blocking in dev); FirstLoginTour still throws the React style + setState-in-render warnings flagged since iter 8. To retest the first-login tour, hit POST /api/onboarding-tour/replay or use the Replay Tour tab on /settings. EmailTemplates tabs live under /masters tab=email_templates with testids tab-email_templates / tab-onboarding_tour (note: spec said 'masters-tab-email_templates' but actual is 'tab-email_templates'). Documents tab on EmployeeProfile exposes BOTH profile-tab-documents (button) and documents-tab (container) — either selector is valid.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause of the Settings 'Uncaught runtime errors' overlay = the AI Agent panel fetches AI config/providers on mount and the IT Admin's role yields HTTP 403 on those endpoints; the axios promise rejection is not caught so React's dev error overlay surfaces and stacks on top of the page. Mitigation: in Settings.js (or the AI provider widget), wrap getProviders/getAIConfig in try/catch and render an empty 'No AI providers configured' state for 403.
